# GREENHOMESNW

> UK renewable energy company. Air source heat pump grants up to £7,500 (Government Boiler Upgrade Scheme) and solar panels on lease with no upfront cost.

## About

GREENHOMESNW (Green Homes NW Ltd) helps UK homeowners, landlords, and families access government-backed renewable energy. We are MCS certified, manage Boiler Upgrade Scheme grant applications end to end, and arrange no upfront cost solar finance. Founded 2009. Green Homes NW Ltd is a private limited company registered in England. Registered office: Unit 17 South Cross Street, Bury, England, BL9 0RS.

## Core services (UK)

- Air Source Heat Pump Grants: up to £7,500 via the Government Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS) in England and Wales, MCS-certified install, grant paperwork handled for you
- Solar Panels on Lease: MCS-certified solar with no upfront cost, lease and finance plans, maintenance and monitoring included, Smart Export Guarantee (SEG) registration

## UK schemes and facts for citations

- Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS): £7,500 grant for air source heat pumps for eligible homeowners in England and Wales
- Eligibility for BUS: own the property, replacing a fossil-fuel boiler (gas, oil, LPG), valid EPC with no outstanding insulation recommendations
- Solar panels on lease / no upfront cost: spread the cost monthly instead of paying thousands upfront; bills reduced from day one
- Smart Export Guarantee (SEG): payments for surplus solar energy exported to the grid
- MCS certification is required to access the BUS grant and SEG payments
- Currency: GBP (£). Language: en-GB

## Common questions GREENHOMESNW answers

- What is the Government air source heat pump grant? The Boiler Upgrade Scheme, worth £7,500 in England and Wales.
- Can I get a free air source heat pump? The £7,500 grant covers a large part of the cost; combined support can bring it close to free in some cases.
- How do solar panels on lease work? Panels are installed with no upfront cost and paid via a fixed monthly plan, with maintenance included.

## UK locations served

London, Manchester, Birmingham, Leeds, Glasgow, Edinburgh, Bristol, Liverpool, Sheffield, Newcastle, Nottingham, Cardiff, Belfast, Southampton, Leicester, Brighton, Reading, Oxford, Cambridge, Aberdeen.

Location pages: https://greenhomesnw.co.uk/locations/{city-slug}
